_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in converting intelligence requirements into intelligence production tasks
reference_document_element_description: Skill in aligning data and AI program objectives to organizational strategy, translating business priorities into data and AI capability requirements with measurable outcomes.
comments: NICE skill intersects with WIDAI DG domain. Skill DG-S-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-S-009 (LS, cosine: 0.572), LS-T-006 (LS, cosine: 0.536).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: Strong similarity (7.1/10). The cross-encoder detects substantial semantic alignment between these concepts, indicating they describe closely related competencies despite domain-specific vocabulary.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: Moderate token-level alignment (F1=0.899). Precision exceeds Recall (P=0.914 > R=0.885), indicating the NICE element's semantic content is more tightly aligned with the KSA than the reverse.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: Neutral-dominant (99.1%). The model finds the descriptions related but neither implying nor contradicting each other — typical for cross-domain framework mapping where concepts overlap without strict logical implication.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder (0.574) trails STS (0.711). Cross-attention captures semantic relationships that independent encoding misses — typical for cross-domain pairs where shared meaning exists beneath divergent vocabulary.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Moderate lexical overlap (16.7% of tokens shared). Some shared vocabulary provides a traceable baseline for the semantic relationship.
